name: Vampire Bat
phrases: skreeeee...so much blood in these veins
I smell you. I WILL find you.
tasty, tasty little snack
the night is mine to hunt
Got you now, morsel
so hungry...when did I last feed
Your neck sings to my sonar
flap flap flap — diving for the kill
can't escape me in the darkness
mmm...dripping red goodness
screech, SCREECH, screEeEeEee!
upside down and content
where's that heartbeat...there
I'll drain you dry, little one
caves are my kingdom, my throne
echolocation never fails me
wings beat too fast for your eyes
nothing...nothing tastes like fresh blood
come here. Come closer.
daylight burns, but I hide so well
this nest...MY nest...so perfect
One bite. That's all.
nocturnal hunts fuel my hunger
you run slower than my wingbeats
the shadows always shelter me
blood on my fangs, warm and wet
swooping, diving, diving down
your vein calls to my hunger
born under moonlight, cursed to feed
another victim for my cave
